Play Faux Hollows?
(Faux leaves held: <Format(IntegerParameter(1),FF022C)/>/1,000)<If(Equal(IntegerParameter(1),1000))>
<UIForeground>F201FC</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FD</UIGlow>※You are currently carrying the maximum amount of faux leaves, and will not be able to obtain more.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground><Else/><If(GreaterThan(IntegerParameter(1),850))>
<UIForeground>F201FC</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FD</UIGlow>※You are currently carrying near to the maximum amount of faux leaves, and may be unable to receive all faux leaves awarded.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground><Else/></If></If>
